v2x.headline: The Mobility House Unveils New Vehicle-to-Grid Integration Platform for Utilities
v2x.summary: The Mobility House North America launched Cascade EV Aggregator, an optimization platform for bidirectional V2G charging across residential and fleet operations.

v2x.headline: Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure Market: The Transition from Plug-In to Power Grid Integration
v2x.summary: Market analysis reveals the EV charging sector is shifting from hardware-focused deployment to sophisticated energy orchestration with V2G becoming central to grid management strategies.
